_README: Lighting config for ShowRunner — read at launch by the (separate) Lighting module. Editing this file NEVER affects the audio show. Keys starting with _ are notes and are ignored by the app. Set 'enabled' to false to turn lighting off entirely.
_VENUE: CC De Factorij (Maupertuis hall), Zaventem. Rider-confirmed fixtures present: 12x Robe Spiider, 28x Fargo Stagepar 19 Pro Zoom MKII, 14x Robert Juliat 860 Dalis MKII (plus 8x Robe Robin Viva CMY, 9x Showtec LED Bar — unused). We patch a subset: 2 Spiider, 4 Fargo, 2 Dalis. DMX is sACN: 8 ceiling looms + 10 floor DMX ports, each assignable to ANY universe — coordinate which physical ports carry universes 1 & 2 with the venue tech.

_CONFIRM.spiider_mode: Robe Robin Spiider CONFIRMED present (12 at venue). The Mode 2 'Basic' (27ch) channel map in SpiiderMode2Profile.swift is now filled from the OFFICIAL Robe chart v2.3 (verified). Still provisional: confirm the fixture is actually patched in Mode 2 on the day, then tap ARM MOVERS. If it's set to Mode 1/3/4 instead, re-pull that column.
_CONFIRM.dalis: CONFIRMED model: Robert Juliat 860 Dalis MKII (NOT Robe; 14 at venue). DalisStubProfile.swift now implements Mode 3 'Full 1 group 8b' (13ch) from the official RJ manual (verified). Still provisional: confirm the MKII reports 13ch in Mode 3 (SETUP>DMX>PERSONALITY), patch it, then ARM MOVERS.
_CONFIRM.sacn_universes: The two 'universes' numbers below are yours to choose — the venue assigns any DMX port to any universe. Coordinate with the venue tech so universes 1 & 2 reach the Spiider and Fargo/Dalis ports respectively.
_CONFIRM.network: 'mode' = 'multicast' (onto the venue sACN lighting LAN, 239.255.x.x) or 'unicast' (to a node IP via 'unicastHost'). The rider uses sACN over the ceiling/floor DMX looms — confirm whether you plug into their lighting network or a node.
_CONFIRM.fargo_order: Fargo Stagepar 19 Pro Zoom MKII, 9ch order (R,G,B,W,Dim,DimFine,Strobe,Color,Zoom) is from the brief's patch — VERIFY on the day against the fixture's DMX chart. If wrong, edit FargoProfile.swift only.
_CONFIRM.addresses: Fixture DMX start addresses per the brief. Re-patch here if the venue assigns different addresses.
